body:
This PR brings back the Benchmarks section in the Documentation.

We also need to update the README.md to point to https://numericalearth.github.io/OceananigansBenchmarks
Once we converge on the phrasing, I'll add the same paragraph in the README as well.

labels.description: runs preconfigured benchamarks and spits out timing
labels.name: benchmark performance

title: Reinstate Docs/Benchmarks
